title: Severe Flash Flood
description: Rapid water level rise detected near South Terminal. Evacuation recommended.

title: Storm Surge Inundation
description: Coastal roads flooding due to high tide surge combined with heavy rain.

title: Blocked Drainage System
description: Major urban drainage failure leading to localized standing water.

title: River Canal Overflow
description: Canal breaching banks near residential areas.

title: Unexpected Water Surge
description: Water flow velocity spiked. Suspected upstream dam release.
